Operation 'getEmojiSuggestions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The current description lacks clarity about input requirements and output structure. Added explicit mention of the text parameter requirement and clarified the output is a list of emoji suggestions. Enhanced context about the operation's purpose for social media optimization, consistent with the API's domain focus.

data.current_description: Returns list of emoji suggestions for a short block of text (up to 1000 characters).
data.description_suggestion: Analyzes a text block (up to 1000 characters) and returns a list of relevant emoji suggestions. Useful for enhancing social media content with contextually appropriate emojis. Requires the text parameter as input.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about input requirements and output structure. Added explicit mention of the text parameter requirement and clarified the output is a list of emoji suggestions. Enhanced context about the operation's purpose for social media optimization, consistent with the API's domain focus.

message: Operation 'autoEmojify' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about what 'relevant emojis' means and lacks input/output clarity. Improved version specifies that emojis are inserted into the text, clarifies the input parameter requirement, explains the output format (text with integrated emojis), and provides domain context about social media optimization.

data.current_description: Returns text of the post with relevant emojis added automatically.
data.description_suggestion: Automatically inserts contextually relevant emojis into the provided text and returns the enhanced version. Accepts text input (up to 1000 characters) and returns the original text with emojis integrated at appropriate positions. Useful for optimizing social media posts with visual engagement elements.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what 'relevant emojis' means and lacks input/output clarity. Improved version specifies that emojis are inserted into the text, clarifies the input parameter requirement, explains the output format (text with integrated emojis), and provides domain context about social media optimization.

message: Operation 'autoHashtag' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Auto-hashtag text' is vague about the action. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (text content, hashtag count limit) and output format (modified text vs. hashtag list). Enhanced version specifies inputs, outputs, and use case for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns auto-hashtagged text of the post. Automatically adds up to the specified number of relevant hashtags to social media content while considering real-time hashtag popularity metrics.
data.summary_suggestion: Automatically add relevant hashtags to text
data.description_suggestion: Automatically generates and appends relevant hashtags to provided text content based on semantic analysis and real-time hashtag popularity metrics. Accepts text input and a parameter specifying the maximum number of hashtags to add. Returns the original text with appended hashtags and the list of suggested hashtags. Useful for optimizing social media post engagement.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Auto-hashtag text' is vague about the action. Description lacks clarity on input parameters (text content, hashtag count limit) and output format (modified text vs. hashtag list). Enhanced version specifies inputs, outputs, and use case for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getHashtagSuggestionsForImage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity on output format and how suggestions are ranked. Enhanced version specifies the image analysis mechanism, input formats, output structure, and ranking criteria for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Get hashtag suggestions for an image
data.current_description: Returns list of hashtag suggestions for an image. Takes into account both semantic relevancy as well as real-time hashtag engagement. Accepts either a URL or a base64-encoded image.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate hashtag suggestions from image content
data.description_suggestion: Analyzes image content and returns a list of relevant hashtag suggestions based on visual recognition and real-time hashtag engagement metrics. Accepts image input as either a URL or base64-encoded data. Suggestions consider both semantic relevancy to image content and current hashtag popularity to optimize social media reach.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity on output format and how suggestions are ranked. Enhanced version specifies the image analysis mechanism, input formats, output structure, and ranking criteria for improved AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns historical stats for a given hashtag from the last 30 days.
data.description_suggestion: Returns historical analytics data for a specified hashtag covering the last 30 days. Provides time-series metrics including daily tweet volume, engagement rates, reach, and trend patterns. Useful for analyzing hashtag performance trends and identifying optimal posting times. Data is aggregated daily.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks specificity about what metrics are included in the historical data and how it's aggregated.
